hero.title: Coloring My Photo
hero.productName: Coloring My Photo — Turn Photos into Color-by-Number Pages
hero.subtitle: Your memories. Your coloring pages.
hero.description: Pick a picture from your gallery or camera. Coloring My Photo builds a numbered coloring page on your device in seconds — private, fast, and fun for kids and adults.
hero.socialProof: On-device processing · Easy / Medium / Advanced · 8–24 colors · Save, share & PDF · 12 languages
hero.structuredDataDescription: Coloring My Photo turns personal photos into color-by-number coloring pages on iOS and Android. On-device processing, no account required. Coming soon. com.zuki.apps.coloringmyphoto.
hero.seoTitle: Coloring My Photo — Photo Color-by-Number | Zuki Apps
hero.metaDescription: Turn any photo into a personalized color-by-number page. 100% on-device. Coming soon on iOS and Android.

features.title: Personalized coloring art from any photo

process.title: On-device processing
process.description: Your photos never leave your phone for coloring page generation.
items: Edge detection and region segmentation
Numbered areas for tap-to-fill
Works offline after install

levels.title: Detail & color levels
levels.description: Choose how complex and colorful your page should be.
items: Easy, Medium, or Advanced detail
8, 12, 16, or 24 color palettes
Undo and hints while coloring

export.title: Save & share
export.description: Keep progress and finished art on your device.
items: Save to gallery
Share with friends
Export PDF to print at home

family.title: For all ages
family.description: Selfies, pets, landscapes, and favorite moments — supervise children's camera use.
items: No account required
12 language interfaces
Portrait orientation on mobile

howTo.title: How it works
howTo.subtitle: From photo to finished art in three steps.

steps.title: Pick a photo
steps.description: Choose from gallery or camera — selfie, pet, landscape, or any moment.

steps.title: Choose detail & colors
steps.description: Select Easy, Medium, or Advanced and how many colors you want.

steps.title: Color & export
steps.description: Tap numbered regions to fill, then save, share, or print as PDF.

items.question: What is Coloring My Photo?
items.answer: An app that turns personal photos into interactive color-by-number pages. All processing happens on your device. Package: com.zuki.apps.coloringmyphoto.

items.question: Are my photos uploaded?
items.answer: No. Photos are processed locally to create coloring pages. We do not upload your photos to our servers.

items.question: Do I need an account?
items.answer: No account is required. Preferences and saved projects are stored on your device.

items.question: What if processing fails?
items.answer: Try a clearer photo, use Easy detail level, and ensure the image is not extremely small.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: Privacy Policy for Coloring My Photo.
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Zuki Apps handles information when you use Coloring My Photo and related pages at zukiapps.com/coloring-my-photo.

section1.title: 1. Who we are
section1.content: The data controller is Zuki Apps. Contact details are at the end of this Policy.
section1.content2: This Policy applies to the Coloring My Photo app and the legal pages we publish for the product.

section2.title: 2. Information we collect
section2.content: Coloring My Photo processes your photos on your device. We do not upload your photos to our servers for coloring page generation.
items: Photos you select — processed locally only
App preferences and saved projects — stored on device
Finished artwork — saved locally or to your gallery when you choose
Support email — if you contact us directly

section3.title: 3. How we use information
items: Generate color-by-number pages from your photos
Store preferences and projects on your device
Respond to support requests
section3.content2: We do not sell your personal information.

section4.title: 4. Photos and gallery access
section4.content: The app accesses photos you select from your gallery or camera to generate coloring pages.
section4.content2: Processing happens on your device. You can revoke photo or camera permission in system settings at any time.

section5.title: 5. Storage and retention
section5.content: Photos and projects remain on your device until you delete them or uninstall the app.
section5.content2: Support emails are retained as long as needed to resolve your request.

section6.title: 6. Third-party services
section6.content: The app may open system services (photo library, camera, share sheet, app store rating).
section6.content2: Those services are governed by Apple or Google policies.

section7.title: 7. Your rights and children
section7.content: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, or object to certain processing. Contact us to exercise rights.
section7.content2: The app is suitable for general audiences. Parents should supervise children's use of the camera and gallery.

section8.title: 8. Changes
section8.content: We may update this Policy from time to time. We will post the revised version with a new Last updated date.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.metaDescription: Terms of Use for Coloring My Photo.
terms.intro: Please read these Terms carefully before using Coloring My Photo. By downloading or using the app, you agree to these Terms and our Privacy Policy.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: These Terms govern your use of Coloring My Photo operated by Zuki Apps. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.
section1.content2: If you use the Service on behalf of an organization, you represent that you have authority to bind that organization.

section2.title: 2. Description of Service
items: Turn personal photos into color-by-number coloring pages
Tap-to-fill coloring with save, share, and PDF export
On-device processing without an account

section3.title: 3. Your content
section3.content: You retain rights to photos you import. You are responsible for having permission to use any images you process.
section3.content2: Do not use the app to process images you do not have rights to use.

section4.title: 4. Purchases
section4.content: If in-app purchases are offered in the future, they will be processed by Apple or Google under their terms.
section4.content2: Digital unlocks, if any, follow the applicable store refund policies.

section5.title: 5. Acceptable use
items: Use the Service for unlawful purposes
Reverse engineer the app except as permitted by law
Interfere with security or stability features
Create content that infringes others' rights

section6.title: 6. Disclaimer
section6.content: Coloring My Photo is provided as is without warranties. Processing quality depends on the source photo.
section6.content2: You are responsible for backing up finished artwork you care about.

section7.title: 7. Limitation of liability
section7.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Zuki Apps shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from use of the Service.

section8.title: 8. Changes
section8.content: We may modify these Terms. Continued use after the effective date constitutes acceptance.

q1.question: Processing fails or times out?
q1.answer: Try a simpler photo with clear subjects, use Easy detail level, and ensure the photo is not extremely small.

q2.question: Cannot save to gallery?
q2.answer: Allow photo library permission in iOS Settings or Android app permissions.

q3.question: Wrong language?
q3.answer: Open the studio home screen, tap the globe icon, and pick your language.

q4.question: Which languages are supported?
q4.answer: English, Hebrew, Arabic, German, French, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese, Russian, Spanish, and Chinese (Simplified).

additionalHelp.title: Need more help?
additionalHelp.description: If you could not find an answer, email zuki.apps@gmail.com. We typically respond within 24–48 hours.
